summary: D2 bundle currently embeds zero figures. The Phase 6n+6o -> Phase 7 absorption Session 1 (2026-05-06) D.3 GATE 3 reframing (§2.7 Schellekens chain) introduces no new figures and references no existing figures by graphic. Both cross-bundle figure-anchor checks resolve cleanly: D2 §3 vs D4 §4 (Drinfeld center) is vacuously consistent (neither bundle has a Drinfeld-center figure), and D2 §2 vs L2 (modular discriminant) is deliberately bundle-labor-divided (analytic content in D2 §2, visualizations in the L2 paired-splash, GREEN at L2 round 2). All bundle pass criteria satisfied.
notes: If a future Stage-13 review or downstream absorption mandates embedding fig73_sm_generation_constraint.png or fig75_modular_invariance_phase.png into D2 §2 (e.g., to make the 24|c_- claim load-bearing as a stand-alone D2 deliverable independent of the L2 splash), regenerate from src/core/visualizations.py via scripts/review_figures.py, copy the PNG into papers/D2/figures/, add the LaTeX \begin{figure} block with caption matching L2's, and re-run this reviewer. The L2 round-2 captions and fix history (CaptionFigureRangeMismatch resolved; LabelClippingAtRightMargin resolved) are the canonical reference for any such embedding.
